add.purpose: Optional explicit direct start for the exact approved profile; never replaces the safe default BAT.

apply_controls: automatic exact rollback on partial failure
later_test: C4E must test both profiles through WebUI/controller and leave ComfyUI stopped.

replace.purpose: Add exact profile selection, node hash locking, state identity, and profile-conflict handling.
Record both profiles while preserving Safe Normal CPU as default.
Add explicit profile selector and profile-aware start receipt/status display.

stage: C4D controlled WebUI profile apply (no launch)
